title: senecio × weylii
intro: Senecio × weylii, also known as Weyl's ragwort, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the woolly ragwort (Senecio tomentosus) and the prickly ragwort (Senecio squalidus). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and gout. Weyl's ragwort can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
